creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I try to build graphics/py-scikit-image v0.19.0 on 14.0-CURRENT, it breaks as shown below. This is true both inside Poudriere (clean environment) and outside. FreeBSD 12.3 and 13.0 are not affected.

----------
